metadata.description: A local-first, peer-to-peer node built on iroh — the foundation for a P2P issue tracker.

plugins.name: groupchat
plugins.description: A peer-to-peer node built on iroh: a signed-gossip room with presence, exposed as connect/wait/who MCP tools — the foundation for a local-first P2P issue tracker. Requires the `groupchat` binary on PATH.
